name: raycast-org-library
title: Org Library
description: Manage Org-backed bookmarks, images, text snippets, and schema entries from Raycast.
author: Nous Research

commands.name: search-library
commands.title: Search Org Library
commands.description: Search entries from an Org file

commands.name: browse-groups
commands.title: Browse Groups
commands.description: Browse entries grouped by Org heading path

commands.name: browse-tags
commands.title: Browse Tags
commands.description: Browse entries by Org headline tags

commands.name: add-entry
commands.title: Add Org Library Entry
commands.description: Add a bookmark, image, text, or schema entry

preferences.name: orgFilePath
preferences.title: Org File Path
preferences.description: Absolute path to the Org file storing library entries
